scripts.dev:client: bun run build:native && bun run --cwd apps/client dev
scripts.dev:client:clean: bun run clean:data -- --client-dir=./dist && bun run dev:client
scripts.dev:server:clean: bun run clean:data -- --server-dir=./dist && bun run dev:server
scripts.dev:full: bun run build:native && bun run --cwd apps/cli dev-full
scripts.dev:full:clean: bun run clean:data && bun run dev:full
